---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: /
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 12
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
page-layout: full
---

## Recent Posts

Thoughts on statistics, data science, R programming, and quantitative methods.
